title: The Empire of Dracula
writer: Ramón Obón, Luis Enrique Vergara, Bram Stoker
actors: Lucha Villa, César del Campo, Eric del Castillo
plot: In this partial remake of "Dracula, Prince of Darkness," a handsome vampire named Draculstein is resurrected by his manservant, Igor, so that Draculstein may avenge himself against the son of the man who killed him years earlier.
